./

spdfgethttpproxyvalues.pro


Routines

top source SpdfGetHttpProxyValues

SpdfGetHttpProxyValues, proxy_authentication, proxy_hostname, proxy_port, proxy_username, proxy_password

Gets the HTTP proxy values for the IDLnetURL PROXY_* properties. If access to the Internet is through an HTTP proxy, the caller should ensure that the HTTP_PROXY environment is correctly set before this procedure is called. The HTTP_PROXY value should be of the form http://username:password@hostname:port/. If the HTTP_PROXY environment is not set, the values returned will indicate to IDLnetURL not to use a proxy. See IDLnetURL documentation for more details about the values.

Parameters

proxy_authentication out type=int

Type of authentication used when connecting to a proxy server.

proxy_hostname out type=string

The proxy server name.

proxy_port out type=string

The proxy's TCP/IP port.

proxy_username out type=string

Username for authenticating with the proxy server.

proxy_password out type=string

Password for authenticating with the proxy server.

File attributes
